name: Chestnut Broth with Soft Spices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the chopped carrot, leek, and celery. Cook until they start to color, about 5 minutes. Stir in all the spices (nutmeg, cinnamon, coriander, mace) and cook for a few seconds. Add water and passata, stirring well. Add chestnuts and bring to a boil. Cook until soft, about 20 minutes.
2. Add milk and lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Puree the mixture in a blender or food processor. Return the blended sauce to the pan, heat through, and serve hot.
